content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 12:07 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
I need to find Apple's headphone product pages. Apple likely has two types of pages for each product:
1. A "product page" (marketing/storytelling page) - like apple.com/airpods-max/ or apple.com/airpods-pro/
2. A "buy page" (purchase/configuration page) - like apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-max

Please fetch the following URLs and confirm which ones work. For each working URL, describe what type of page it is (marketing overview vs purchase/configuration):

1. https://www.apple.com/airpods-max/
2. https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-max
3. https://www.apple.com/airpods-pro/
4. https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro
5. https://www.apple.com/airpods-4/
6. https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-4

For each page that works, extract:
- The page title
- The URL structure
- A brief description of the page layout (hero section, what sections exist, is it a marketing page or a buy/configure page)
- Key section names visible on the page
- Any navigation tabs or sticky nav elements

Return ALL findings so the user can confirm which pages to analyze in depth.
</user_query>
The user wants me to fetch several Apple product pages and analyze their structure. Let me fetch all 6 URLs in parallel to check which ones work and gather information about each page.

Now I have all the data. Let me summarize the findings for each URL:

1. https://www.apple.com/airpods-max/ - ✅ Works - Marketing/Product Page for AirPods Max 2
2. https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-max - ✅ Works - Buy/Configuration Page for AirPods Max 2
3. https://www.apple.com/airpods-pro/ - ✅ Works - Marketing/Product Page for AirPods Pro 3
4. https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro - ❌ 404 Not Found


5. https://www.apple.com/airpods-4/ - ✅ Works - Marketing/Product Page for AirPods 4
6. https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-4 - ✅ Works - Buy/Configuration Page for AirPods 4

The pattern is clear: most product pages and their corresponding shop pages are accessible, with one notable exception being the AirPods Pro purchase page.

input.final_summary: 6 个 URL 中 5 个可访问，1 个（AirPods Pro 购买页）返回 404。3 个营销页（/airpods-max/、/airpods-pro/、/airpods-4/）均为长页面叙事结构，含 Hero → 多功能板块 → 产品对比 → CTA；2 个购买页（/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-max、/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-4）为简洁配置+对比结构，以 FAQ 和全线对比表为主。AirPods Pro 的购买页 URL 可能已改为 /shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro-3。详细页面结构见下方汇总。

content.text:
以下是 6 个 URL 的抓取结果汇总：

---

## 状态总览

| # | URL | 状态 | 页面类型 |
|---|-----|------|---------|
| 1 | `apple.com/airpods-max/` | **可访问** | 营销/叙事页 |
| 2 | `apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-max` | **可访问** | 购买/对比页 |
| 3 | `apple.com/airpods-pro/` | **可访问** | 营销/叙事页 |
| 4 | `apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro` | **404 不存在** | — |
| 5 | `apple.com/airpods-4/` | **可访问** | 营销/叙事页 |
| 6 | `apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-4` | **可访问** | 购买/对比页 |

> AirPods Pro 的购买页 404，猜测 URL 已更新为 `/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro-3`（产品已升级到第三代）。

---

## 1. AirPods Max — 营销页

- **URL**: `https://www.apple.com/airpods-max/`
- **页面标题**: AirPods Max 2 - Apple
- **页面类型**: 营销/品牌叙事（长页面滚动）

**布局结构**:
| 板块 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| Hero | "Listening. Remastered." + 5 色产品轮播（Midnight / Starlight / Blue / Purple / Orange） |
| 设计细节 | Digital Crown、canopy、cushions、anodized cups、telescoping arms 逐一展示 |
| Superior Sound | H2 芯片、高动态范围放大器、Adaptive EQ、Lossless Audio、Personalized Spatial Audio |
| Noise Control | 1.5x ANC 提升、Adaptive Audio、Transparency |
| Communication | Live Translation、Conversation Awareness、Loud Sound Reduction、Personalized Volume |
| 日常体验 | 20h 续航、Siri、Automatic Switching、Audio Sharing、USB-C、Smart Case |
| CTA 服务区 | 刻字、配送、Apple Card 分期、视频选购、Apple Store App |
| 产品对比表 | AirPods Max 2 vs AirPods Pro 3 规格对比 |

**粘性导航**: 页面顶部有 Apple 全局导航栏；板块之间通过滚动过渡，无额外 sticky subnav tabs。

---

## 2. AirPods Max — 购买页

- **URL**: `https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-max`
- **页面标题**: Buy AirPods Max 2 - Apple
- **页面类型**: 购买/配置页

**布局结构**:
| 板块 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| Hero | "Buy AirPods Max 2" + "New" 标签 |
| FAQ | Live Translation 支持语言列表 |
| 全线对比表 | AirPods 4（$129）→ AirPods 4 ANC（$179）→ AirPods Pro 3（$249）→ **AirPods Max 2（$549）** 四栏对比，含 ANC、Spatial Audio、续航等规格 |
| Apple Music 促销 | 购买送 3 个月 Apple Music |

**特点**: 页面简洁，无长叙事，核心是价格 + 规格对比 + 购买入口。无产品渲染动画。

---

## 3. AirPods Pro — 营销页

- **URL**: `https://www.apple.com/airpods-pro/`
- **页面标题**: AirPods Pro 3 - Apple
- **页面类型**: 营销/品牌叙事（长页面滚动，内容最丰富）

**布局结构**:
| 板块 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| Hero | "The world's best in-ear Active Noise Cancellation" + 6 个核心卖点图标列表 |
| Intelligent Noise Control | ANC 2x 提升、ultra-low-noise mic、Voice Isolation、Adaptive Audio、Conversation Awareness |
| Audio Performance | H2 芯片、multiport acoustic architecture、custom driver + amplifier |
| Personalized Listening | Adaptive EQ、Personalized Spatial Audio、dynamic head tracking |
| Fitness（新板块） | 心率传感、Fitness app 联动、IP57 防护 |
| Hearing Health | Hearing Test、Hearing Aid（+67% 续航）、Conversation Boost、Hearing Protection |
| Experience | Live Translation、Controls（camera remote）、Siri、Connectivity |
| Battery | 8h ANC / 10h 助听模式、MagSafe 充电盒、Find My + Precision Finding |
| CTA 服务区 | 刻字、配送、分期、视频选购、Apple Store App |
| 产品对比表 | AirPods Pro 3 vs AirPods 4 ANC |
| 环保 / 隐私 / 无障碍 | 三个品牌价值区块 |

**粘性导航**: 顶部全局 nav；多个板块有内部 tab 切换（如 Experience 板块内的 Live Translation / Controls / Siri / Connectivity tabs）。

---

## 4. AirPods Pro — 购买页

- **URL**: `https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro`
- **状态**: **404 Not Found**
- 可能的正确 URL: `/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-pro-3`

---

## 5. AirPods 4 — 营销页

- **URL**: `https://www.apple.com/airpods-4/`
- **页面标题**: AirPods 4 - Apple
- **页面类型**: 营销/品牌叙事（长页面滚动）

**布局结构**:
| 板块 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| Hero | "Iconic. Now supersonic." + 4 张特写轮播（ANC 触控、翻译、H2 芯片、充电盒） |
| Audio Performance | Spatial Audio、H2 芯片、Voice Isolation、low-distortion driver、Adaptive EQ、FaceTime HD |
| Active Noise Cancellation | ANC（可选）、Adaptive Audio、Transparency、Conversation Awareness |
| Wearability | 重新设计的佩戴、force sensor stem、IP54 防护 |
| Battery | 充电盒缩小 10%+、30h 总续航、USB-C + 无线充电 |
| Seamless Experience | 配对、Automatic Switching、Find My、Siri、Audio Sharing |
| CTA 服务区 | 刻字、配送、分期、视频选购 |
| 产品对比表 | AirPods 4（基础版）vs AirPods 4 ANC（$179）双栏对比 |

---

## 6. AirPods 4 — 购买页

- **URL**: `https://www.apple.com/shop/buy-airpods/airpods-4`
- **页面标题**: Buy AirPods 4 - Apple
- **页面类型**: 购买/配置页

**布局结构**:
| 板块 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| Hero | "Buy AirPods 4" + "Free Engraving" 标签 |
| 产品选择 | AirPods 4 基础版链接（$129）+ AirPods 4 ANC 版链接（$179） |
| FAQ | Live Translation 支持语言、不含充电线和电源适配器说明 |
| 全线对比表 | 四栏对比（AirPods 4 / 4 ANC / Pro 3 / Max 2），与 Max 购买页结构一致 |
| Apple Music 促销 | 3 个月免费 |

---

## 页面模式小结

**营销页**（`/airpods-xxx/`）：长页面叙事，Hero + 多个功能板块逐段展开 + 产品对比 + CTA。面向"了解产品"。

**购买页**（`/shop/buy-airpods/xxx`）：短页面，产品选择 / 配色 → 全线对比表 → FAQ → 促销。面向"决定购买"。

请确认哪些页面需要深入分析，以及是否需要我尝试抓取 AirPods Pro 的购买页正确 URL。
